title: Beginner Module 7 Practice: DCAA and the ICS
description: Longbow Systems submitted its ICS on June 25. Ten days later, DCAA sends a written deficiency notice identifying three issues: (1) Schedule H is signed by the VP of Sales, not an officer with financial authority; (2) The G&A pool total on Schedule A does not match the sum of line items on Schedule B; (3) Schedule F is missing entirely, though Longbow had two subcontractors during the year.
